qualityPolicy.notes: Checklist B enables more-code-per-round strategy while keeping strict unattended A/B safety budget and class policy

executionHints.description: Checklist B uses stride=2 to run code-step-only on stride rounds and aggregate code changes more aggressively

D1.description: Add hint-disabled action/action_source helpers and reuse in both preclass-disabled branches

D2.description: Add route-change block/fallback helpers and reuse in route-change normalization branch

D3.description: Add fallback-none and decision-none helpers, then route fallback comparisons through helpers

operations.pattern: static const char\* wc_preclass_route_change_fallback\(const char\* fallback_reason\)

D4.description: Freeze round: no additional code-step change
